Profile.title: Profile
Profile.description: Public student profile statistics and status for leaderboard and dashboard insights

averagePercentile.description: Calculated percentile compared to simulated toppers

predictedRank.description: Estimated rank in the actual exam

PrivateInfo.title: PrivateInfo
PrivateInfo.description: Sensitive user identity and subscription status information

purchasedSeries.description: List of unlocked specific exam package IDs

createdAt.description: Creation timestamp of the user account

MockTest.title: MockTest
MockTest.description: A comprehensive standard mock test paper for a government exam

title.description: The full title of the mock paper

category.description: The specific Indian exam category (UPSC, SSC, Banking, Rail)

questionsCount.description: Total number of questions in paper

durationMinutes.description: Timer duration allocated for the paper

questions.description: Strictly limited questions database payload containing options, answers and tags

UserAttempt.title: UserAttempt
UserAttempt.description: A record of a mock test attempt submission containing section-level analytics and user choices

testTitle.description: Mock exam title at time of attempt

timeSpentSeconds.description: Time spent in seconds in test browser

answers.description: List of user responses mapped with visual details

PrepVideo.title: PrepVideo
PrepVideo.description: Curated lectures and study preparation videos published by system administrators

title.description: Short and concise title for the lecture or video

description.description: Short summary or outline of topics covered in the lecture

category.description: The specific Indian exam category (UPSC, SSC, Banking, Rail, or General)

videoUrl.description: The video hyperlink (YouTube, Vimeo, or MP4 URL)

DeletedAsset.title: DeletedAsset
DeletedAsset.description: Identifier tracking corresponding system local assets which are deleted / hidden by an Admin dynamically

GeminiApiKey.title: GeminiApiKey
GeminiApiKey.description: User personal Gemini API key for Bring Your Own API Key feature

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this key was configured

ActivityLog.title: ActivityLog
ActivityLog.description: Log records generated by users when they login, submit mock tests, or purchase premium

userName.description: Name of the user related to the action

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Payment transactions processed via Razorpay secure gateways

orderId.description: Secure order token generated by Gateway

plan.description: Identifier description of the tier/plan or exam series purchased

DashboardMetrics.title: DashboardMetrics
DashboardMetrics.description: Global performance indicator counters and variables synchronized in real-time

/admins/{userId}.description: List of manual administrative accounts permitted write access to main exam templates

/admins/{userId}/private/geminiKey.description: Secure BYOK storage for separate administrative user credentials

/users/{userId}.description: Student public statistical profile dashboard record

/users/{userId}/private/info.description: Direct personal details containing subscription keys and high-security details

/users/{userId}/private/geminiKey.description: Secure BYOK storage for separate personal user keys

/mockTests/{testId}.description: Admin managed mock examination syllabus paper collection

/users/{userId}/attempts/{attemptId}.description: Detailed log history entries for self study progress, stats and charts

/prepVideos/{videoId}.description: Admin managed exam preparation high-quality lectures and videos collection

/deletedAssets/{assetId}.description: Real-time records tracking soft deleted default system local exams or videocasts

/activityLogs/{logId}.description: User generated system event log items displayed in real-time on the Admin panel

/payments/{paymentId}.description: Payment transactions processed via Razorpay secure gateways

/dashboard/{id}.description: Global performance indicators synchronized in real-time
